behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all required function names (_content_hash, _load_cache, _save_cache), CLI flags, file paths (.ai/AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, pr_checks.md, .gitignore, Makefile), target names (typing, check-repo, check-model-rules*), and schema requirements (JSON dict, hex digest >=32 chars, cache path containing '.json' and 'cache').

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (deterministic, order-insensitive hash; module-level variable; CLI flag) but doesn't dictate implementation like 'use hashlib.sha256' or specific code lines.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral properties (hash determinism, round-trip, CLI help mentions cache) and the cache-var search is generic (any module-level assign whose value contains '.json' and 'cache'), allowing multiple correct implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests exec extracted functions, call _content_hash/_save_cache/_load_cache, run subprocesses (make -n, python --help, parse_args), not just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_content_hash requires determinism + differentiation + order-insensitivity which a stub returning constant would fail (h1 != h2 assertion); cache round-trip requires real persistence.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover caching helpers, CLI flag, Makefile typing target, removed targets, check-repo invocation, backward-compat flags — aligning with instruction sections 1-3.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with header comments ('Gates', 'Fail-to-pass', 'Pass-to-pass') and docstrings per test function.

structured_data_schema.reason: JSON cache schema (flat dict mapping path->hex digest) is documented in instruction with an explicit example.

no_typos.reason: File paths and target names are consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files that must change but does not reveal buggy lines; the files to modify are intrinsic to the task scope.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Edits to .ai/AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, pr_checks.md, .gitignore are localized string additions/replacements, not full rewrites, and are consistent with each other.
